title: Fix gate-ish model using lots of memory and hanging
body:
Hi,
When running "verilator -cc" on the file [test11018.txt](https://github.com/user-attachments/files/16265092/test11018.txt) Verilator crashes with the following message:
```
%Error: Verilator threw signal 9. Suggest trying --debug --gdbbt
%Error: Command Failed ulimit -s unlimited 2>/dev/null; exec /usr/local/share/verilator/bin/verilator_bin -cc test11018.v
```
When running with "--debug" and "--gdbbt" option, this is the output: 
```
Program terminated with signal SIGKILL, Killed.
The program no longer exists.
No stack.
%Error: export VERILATOR_ROOT=/usr/local/share/verilator
%Error: ulimit -s unlimited 2>/dev/null; exec setarch --addr-no-randomize gdb /usr/local/share/verilator/bin/verilator_bin_dbg --batch --quiet --return-child-result -ex "run -cc test11018.v --debug --gdbbt" -ex 'set width 0' -ex 'bt' -ex 'quit'
%Error: Command Failed ulimit -s unlimited 2>/dev/null; exec setarch --addr-no-randomize gdb /usr/local/share/verilator/bin/verilator_bin_dbg --batch --quiet --return-child-result -ex "run -cc test11018.v --debug --gdbbt" -ex 'set width 0' -ex 'bt' -ex 'quit'
```
I am running the following Verilator version:
Verilator 5.027 devel rev v5.026-29-ge3e7b3f2b

This program was accepted on the Jasper Formal Verification Platform from Cadence Design Systems, so I think this program is correct.
